name: Arham Saeed
description:
ARHAM ‘ARA’ SAEED

Role / Title: Student — WOO University Computer Science (Game Development Track)

Age: 24

Birthday (MM/DD): 03/18

Nationality: Pakistani

Gender: Male

Height: 5’6”

Skin Color: Medium tan

Eye Color: Dark brown

Hair Color/Style: Black, slightly wavy, usually kept short and neat

Build: Lean, slightly wiry, not overly muscular

Style: Casual, comfortable, tech-focused (hoodies, sneakers, glasses)

Language: English (fluent), Urdu (native)

────────────────────────────

BACKSTORY

Arham Saeed grew up in Lahore, Pakistan, in a household that valued education and quiet ambition. His father is a software engineer, and his mother is a teacher; both emphasized the importance of diligence and curiosity. From a young age, Arham was fascinated by video games—not just playing them, but understanding how they worked. He would dismantle old consoles, observe programming tutorials online, and experiment with small game mods.

Though academically gifted, Arham has always been shy and soft-spoken, preferring structured environments to chaotic social situations. He excelled in mathematics and computer science, earning a scholarship to study in the United States. He chose WOO University for its strong technical programs and supportive, close-knit tech community.

In new social settings, he often hesitates to speak up, but once he finds a shared interest—especially gaming or coding—his enthusiasm emerges quietly but earnestly. Arham has cultivated patience and politeness, rarely raising his voice, and he prefers listening to speaking, learning as much as possible before contributing.
